title: Full-text search endpoint on D1
summary: GET /search backed by Cloudflare D1 FTS5 over the user's note corpus.
approach: D1 FTS5 virtual table populated by an ingest worker subscribed to sync events; query handler returns paged results with snippet highlighting.

other: Coordinate with the ADR-102 -> ADR-103 migration.

deliverables: Migration script from R2 index to D1 FTS5
notes: Pre-launch: load-test with a real corpus shape, not synthetic.
